name: Bernie's Fudge
recipeIngredient: 13 oz (340g) Hershey's milk chocolate (or equivalent candy bars)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, granulated sugar, and evaporated milk in a large saucepan.
2. Stir until the mixture is dissolved.
3. Bring to a boil and continue stirring until it reaches a rolling boil.
4. Boil for five minutes without stirring.
5. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallows until they are dissolved.
6. Add chocolate (melted) one at a time until fully melted.
7. Stir in vanilla extract and nuts, if using.
8. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased 10 by 15-inch pan.
9. Refrigerate until firm, then cut into small squares.
(Note: This recipe was shared on Prodigy in September 1995 and formatted for MEAL MASTER by Elaine Radis.)
